title: lamium ladanum
intro: Lamium ladanum, also known as spikenard, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Lamium ladanum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Lamium ladanum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
